nodes.label: numb Meaning: Unable to feel anything (no sensation) Nuance: Can be physical (body) or emotional (no feelings) Sentence: My fingers went numb because it was so cold. After hearing the news, she felt numb.

nodes.label: swollen Meaning: Bigger than normal due to injury, infection, or fluid Nuance: Usually describes body parts (face, ankle, eyes) Sentence: His ankle is swollen after the accident.

nodes.label: foreign Meaning: From another country Nuance: Can also mean “unfamiliar” or “strange” Sentence: She studies a foreign language. The idea felt foreign to him.

nodes.label: diagnose Meaning: To identify a disease or problem by examining symptoms Nuance: Commonly used by doctors Sentence: The doctor diagnosed her with the flu.

nodes.label: diabetes Meaning: A disease where the body cannot properly control blood sugar Nuance: A long-term (chronic) condition Sentence: My grandfather has diabetes, so he avoids sugary food.
